title: Relation Schema
description: Maintains an explicit unidirectional map connecting entity IDs to preserve a document-first architecture without relational databases.

id.description: Unique deterministic identifier for the relationship record.

schema_version.description: Semantic versioning string (e.g., 1.0.0) mapping to this contract.

source_id.description: The origin element ID (e.g., a specific document_id).

target_id.description: The destination element ID (e.g., a meeting_id or agenda_item_id).

type.description: The functional context of the structural link.
